column3: ['A remote pilot with equivalent experience accrued outside of the competence framework submits a trial flight request. ', 'The system verifies that the remote pilot meets other criteria (e.  , through personal logbook). ', 'The system creates a TDA and consultation package for the trial flight. ', 'The created TDA and consultation package is accepted by the CAA. ', 'The trial flight can proceed with proper segregation from other users. ']
column4: ['The system receives a valid trial flight request from a remote pilot who has accumulated their experience outside of the competence framework. ', "The system confirms that the remote pilot's eligibility is met based on additional criteria such as a personal logbook. ", 'The system generates both a Trial Flight Authorization (TDA) and a consultation package for the specified trial flight. ', 'The Civil Aviation Authority (CAA) approves the generated TDA and consultation package for the trial flight. ', 'The trial flight takes place, ensuring it does not interfere with any ongoing flights or operations. ']
